name: THUNDER MOUNTAIN GOLD INC
summary: Thunder Mountain Gold, Inc. is a Nevada-based mineral exploration company focused on gold and other metals. Its primary asset is the South Mountain Project in Idaho, operated through subsidiary South Mountain Mines, Inc. The company also evaluates the Trout Creek Project in Nevada. It conducts geophysical, geochemical, and drilling exploration activities with no current production or revenue.
